changes: Added asOfDate query param extraction from nextUrl.searchParams
asOfDate defaults to resolveAsOfDate() when not provided
asOfDateDb = asOfDate.replace(/-/g,'') for DB string comparison
stockQuote.findMany now uses { stockId: symbol, date: { lte: asOfDateDb } }
cacheKey now includes asOfDate to prevent stale cache cross-gate
StockDetailResponse interface updated with asOfDate, asOfGateStatus, asOfGateNote fields

dbQueriesGated.after: { where: { stockId: symbol, date: { lte: asOfDateDb } } }

ungatedQueries.reason: Uses year/quarter ordering, no date field available for gate
ungatedQueries.limitation: Documented in asOfGateNote and limitations array

Uses date desc ordering but no asOf filter added — deferred to P0-03
